itinerary_data.weather_summary: Late spring conditions with temperatures 15–24°C. Mild and pleasant with occasional light rain. Ideal for walking and sightseeing.
seasonal_warnings: Start outdoor activities early to avoid midday heat and traffic spikes.
Keep a hydration buffer and backup indoor option for one block each day.
Occasional spring showers — carry a light jacket or umbrella
Museums can be busy on weekends — book Main Tower in advance

hotel.name: Radisson Blu Hotel Frankfurt
hotel.booking_notes: Free cancellation policies vary by season; verify before payment.

days.title: Arrival & Old Town Exploration
days.day_notes: Keep hydration and transfer buffers in mind. Mandatory rest after overnight flight.

activities.title: Airport Transfer to Hotel
activities.location: Frankfurt Airport to Radisson Blu Hotel Frankfurt
activities.description: Take a taxi from Frankfurt Airport to Radisson Blu Hotel Frankfurt. Estimated 20-minute drive.
activities.weather_tip: Clear spring morning, light jacket recommended

days.title: Day 7 Highlights
days.day_notes: Keep hydration and transfer buffers in mind.

activities.title: Boarding - Return Flight to Pune
activities.description: Board Lufthansa return flight to Pune via Delhi connection.

tips: Always carry your Radisson Rewards card for discounts and point earning
Lufthansa offers free seat selection for premium economy passengers - book early
